Motion To Challenge Soma Hotel Llc'S Claim Of Privilege Aas To Docs Produced By Non-Party Deponents
Off Calendar May-30-2024 Continued To Aug-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: CROSS DEFENDANT HATHAWAY DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's Motion To Challenge Soma Hotel Llc'S Claim Of Privilege Aas To Docs Produced By Non-Party Deponents.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Artak Mamikonyan, Esq., of PIERCE KAVCIOGLU ESPINOSA & CESAR, (818) 728-4999, for Plaintiff.
Rebecca D. Takacs, Esq., of HANSON BRIDGETT LLP, (415) 777-3200, for Soma Hotel LLC, Defendant.
Roxana M. Cremene, Esq., of MILLER, MORTON, CAILLAT & NEVIS, LLP, (408) 292-1765, for Hathaway Dinwiddie Construction Company, Cross Defendant/Complainant.
Taylor J. Pohle, Esq., of COLLINS + COLLINS LLP, (510) 844-5100, for ARUP NORTH AMERICA LTD., non-party.

There is no stipulation to the Judge Pro Tem deciding this matter.

The subject matter is discussed. At conclusion of discussion, CROSS DEFENDANT HATHAWAY DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's Motion To Challenge Soma Hotel Llc'S Claim Of Privilege As To Docs Produced By Non-Party Deponents is continued to Discovery on Aug-01-2024 at 1:30 p.m. for additional hearing as specially-set by Judge Pro Tem Geri Green. There is a discussion with attorneys Roxana Cremene and Rebecca Takacs regarding a briefing schedule. A mutual exchange of briefing is to be done by the close of business Jul-26-2024 is confirmed. The following issues are to be addressed in the briefing: 1) Who has standing to clawback the subject information; 2) whether contractors are privilege holders and if so enumeration of their duties to assert the privilege; 3) whether the discovery protocols agreed to by the parties apply to this 3rd party subpoenas, and 4) whether this motion should be limited to attorney-client communications. The next hearing will include further meet and confer by the parties and further briefing as described above.

Judge Pro Tem: Geri Green. Clerk: R. Woods. Court Reporter: Lisa Glanville; CSR: 9932; T: 408.499.3376; E: madamreporter21@gmail.com. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar May-30-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: CROSS DEFENDANT HATHAWAY DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's Motion And Notice Of Motion To To Compel Arup North America Limiteds Compliance With Deposition Subpoena.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Artak Mamikonyan, Esq., of PIERCE KAVCIOGLU ESPINOSA & CESAR, (818) 728-4999, for Plaintiff.
Rebecca D. Takacs, Esq., of HANSON BRIDGETT LLP, (415) 777-3200, for Soma Hotel LLC, Defendant.
Roxana M. Cremene, Esq., of MILLER, MORTON, CAILLAT & NEVIS, LLP, (408) 292-1765, for Hathaway Dinwiddie Construction Company, Cross Defendant/Complainant.
Taylor J. Pohle, Esq., of COLLINS + COLLINS LLP, (510) 844-5100, for ARUP NORTH AMERICA LTD., non-party.

There is no stipulation to the Judge Pro Tem deciding this matter.

The subject matter is discussed. At conclusion of discussion, CROSS DEFENDANT HATHAWAY DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's Motion To Compel Arup North America Limited's Compliance With Deposition Subpoena is continued to Discovery on Jul-02-2024 at 1:30 p.m. for additional hearing as specially-set by Judge Pro Tem Geri Green. The next hearing will include further meet and confer on the following issues: 1) clarification on the contents of the correspondence file in order to better assist in identifying privileged documents; 2) clarification on how privileged documents are maintained and protected by the company; 3) clarification on whether a stipulation regarding a protective order could resolve some of the problems and what the impediments may be; 4) clarification on how payment records are stored and cataloged in the Project File; 5) identification of the documents where the parties agree to production; and 6) clarification on the Project File's computer generated file directory. Counsel is directed to submit a status memo prior to the hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: Geri Green. Clerk: R. Woods. Court Reporter: Lisa Glanville; CSR: 9932; T: 408.499.3376; E: madamreporter21@gmail.com. (302/JPT)
